name: Visual UI Editor

releases.author: eChorgi
releases.description: v1.1.4 新增繁体中文支持，优化细节以通过上架审核
releases.name: v1.1.4 新增繁体中文支持，优化细节以通过上架审核

releases.author: eChorgi
releases.description:
- Allows editing colors using rgb() and rgba() syntax.
- Resolved issues with the preview window and alpha channel loading
- Fixed an issue where clicks would occasionally trigger underlying page events, leading to inaccurate element selection.
- Replaced native confirm dialogs with custom UI components to meet review requirements.
- Optimized the confirmation logic for the close button.
- Fixed other bugs
releases.name: v1.1.3 Bug Fixes and New Features

releases.author: eChorgi
releases.description:
# 1.1.0 Release
一个帮助你可视化选择并修改任意UI元素的插件。
A plugin to help you visually select and modify any UI element.

- 新增输入文本编辑色值功能
- Add text input for color picker

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/eChorgi/obsidian-plugin-ui-designer/commits/v1.1.0
releases.name: v1.1.0: Add text input for color picker
